title: carex tojquianensis
intro: Carex tojquianensis, also known as Tojquia Sedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is a perennial plant native to Mexico, traditionally used by the indigenous Tojquia people for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carex tojquianensis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In traditional herbal preparations, Carex tojquianensis is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
